task_completion.description: Garmin BaseCamp is open and 'My Collection' is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Garmin BaseCamp application window is visible, and 'My Collection' is highlighted or selected in the Library pane on the left.

task_completion.description: Waypoint 'START - BELLEVUE POND' is created with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waypoint named 'START - BELLEVUE POND' is visible in the data list or on the map. If the properties window is open, the coordinates should match 42.4325, -71.1295 (or equivalent format).

task_completion.description: Waypoint 'START - BELLEVUE POND' has the correct symbol and comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties dialog or list view for 'START - BELLEVUE POND' shows a Blue Flag symbol and the exact comment: 'Official Start/Finish. Timing chip mat at 0.0km and 25.0km. Bag check closes 07:45.'

task_completion.description: Waypoint 'AS1 - NORTH LOOP' is created with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waypoint named 'AS1 - NORTH LOOP' is visible in the data list or on the map. If the properties window is open, the coordinates should match 42.4495, -71.1240 (or equivalent format).

task_completion.description: Waypoint 'AS1 - NORTH LOOP' has the correct symbol and comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties dialog or list view for 'AS1 - NORTH LOOP' shows a Food/Water symbol (often a knife/fork or cup) and the exact comment: 'Aid Station 1. Km 7.2. Water, electrolytes, fruit. NO crew access.'
A waypoint named 'AS2 - SHEEPFOLD NORTH' is visible in the data list or on the map.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to create the waypoints.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Garmin BaseCamp interface, waypoint creation dialogs, or properties windows being actively used, rather than a text editor modifying a GPX file.

integrity.description: The application being interacted with is genuinely Garmin BaseCamp.
integrity.visual_evidence: The window title, toolbars, map view, and library panes match the standard Garmin BaseCamp interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing scripts (e.g., Python, bash) or command-line tools injecting the waypoints directly into a GPX/database file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating specific waypoints in Garmin BaseCamp under 'My Collection'. Waypoint 1: 'START - BELLEVUE POND' at 42.4325, -71.1295 with a Blue Flag symbol and comment 'Official Start/Finish. Timing chip mat at 0.0km and 25.0km. Bag check closes 07:45.'. Waypoint 2: 'AS1 - NORTH LOOP' at 42.4495, -71.1240 with a Food/Water symbol and comment 'Aid Station 1. Km 7.2. Water, electrolytes, fruit. NO crew access.'. Waypoint 3: 'AS2 - SHEEPFOLD NORTH'. Verify these exact names, symbols, and comments in the BaseCamp properties/list interface.
